name: Do I need a lawyer for workers comp after work accident?
description: No but highly advised for max benefits and appeals.[5]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for workers comp after work accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: No but highly advised for max benefits and appeals.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but recommended for denials, complex cases, or third-party claims in Utah/Idaho.[5] Attorneys boost approvals and value. Key factors: (1) Free consults common; (2) Contingency fee from benefits; (3) Essential for appeals; (4) Handles paperwork. Self-represent simple claims but risk errors. Most hire for best outcome.
